svg.title: Insurance GenAI and Fraud Platform AWS Architecture
svg.desc: Data flows from the gold layer into Amazon S3, then into a GCC secure VPC boundary containing AI/ML, Agentic AI, and FMS vertical-specific services, cross-vertical shared services, shared infrastructure, and governance/security. A PrivateLink/Transit Gateway connector links to a separate SaaS boundary hosting Bedrock, Guardrails, Polly, and Glue Schema Registry.
svg.text: Insurance GenAI & Fraud Platform — AWS Architecture
Gold layer → S3 → AI/ML, Agentic AI & FMS verticals, split across GCC and SaaS trust boundaries
Data lake landing zone, RAG KB, model artifacts
Direct access to customer, claims, underwriting & fraud data
Motor damage & medical underwriting image analytics
Agent runtime: memory, gateway, identity, observability (24 agents)
Document intake & task queueing before agent processing
WhatsApp, IVR, web & social channel messaging into agents
Graph DB for fraud ring / link analysis
Used by two of the three verticals
One shared cluster: agent runtime, tooling, FMS case app
Event-driven inference, tool calls & scoring functions
Private connector at the GCC boundary edge
DB credentials & API keys for GCC-hosted data
Encryption keys, critical for FMS PII
Agent decision & fraud investigation audit trail
Protects FMS case management app & APIs
Bounded prompt/context per call only — no persistence or direct DB access
